description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Fuzzers that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests affecting specific paths. The workflow should only run for the zeromq/libzmq repository and use a matrix strategy to test with different sanitizers. For each sanitizer, build fuzzers using google/oss-fuzz/infra/cifuzz/actions/build_fuzzers and then run them for 300 seconds with google/oss-fuzz/infra/cifuzz/actions/run_fuzzers.
